author: ArkOn Architect
description: Central index of all ArkOn skill modules available for agent loading and orchestration.

skills.name: Luxury Obsidian Design Protocol
skills.description: Sovereign dark-mode UI system with CSS tokens, component patterns, glassmorphism effects, and quality checklists for premium digital experiences.

skills.name: Hormozi GTM Protocol
skills.description: High-ticket positioning framework with Value Ladder architecture, Outcome-First copy formulas, pricing standards, and qualification criteria.
use_when: Creating sales copy or landing pages
Building lead magnets or onboarding flows

skills.name: Agentic SEO Protocol
skills.description: AI-first SEO system with JSON-LD templates, machine-readable content standards, and a 5-step MedSpa audit workflow for local business optimization.
use_when: Deploying structured data on any website

loading_protocol.method: Read the .skill file contents and apply the enclosed standards, templates, and checklists to the current task context.
loading_protocol.discovery: Agents should consult this manifest to identify which skills are relevant to their current task.
loading_protocol.activation: Load skill contents into working context when task domain matches skill domain or use_when triggers.
